User.description: Represents the real user authenticated via Firebase. Tracks linked devices but never stores passwords.

Device.description: Subdocument of User. Tracks devices the user has linked, device type, last active timestamp, optional push tokens.

ShieldIdentity.description: AI-generated proxy identity used to interact with external services. Contains proxy email/phone and browser fingerprint. Enables zero-knowledge browsing.

IdentityRotation.description: Tracks automatic or manual rotation of Shield identities to replace compromised credentials. Supports self-healing.

CommunicationProxy.description: Captures all messages (email/SMS) sent to a ShieldIdentity. Sanitizes content, removes trackers, and tracks delivery status.

ThreatEvent.description: Logs anomalous or suspicious activity related to a ShieldIdentity, e.g., unauthorized IPs, credential leaks, phishing attempts. Enables fraud detection.

AuditLog.description: Immutable log of all critical events (rotations, burns, suspicious access, filtered communications) stored with blockchain hash for accountability.

AIEngineLog.description: Optional logs of AI engine decisions, e.g., flagged phishing or suspicious activity, with confidence scores.

ShieldAccess.description: Tracks each access of a ShieldIdentity, including device, IP, and geolocation. Core for fraud detection and anomaly monitoring.
